ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ledger_accounts" (
  "ledger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ledger account */,
  "ledger_name" TEXT /* Name of the ledger account */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ledger account */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency associated with the ledger account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ledger account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ledger account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ledger account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ledger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_centers" (
  "cost_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost center */,
  "cost_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost center */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the cost center */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget associated with the cost center */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cost center is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cost center was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cost center was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_centers_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_centers_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "parent_company_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent company */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the company is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "company_id" TEXT /* ID of the company associated with the location */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business unit */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the business unit */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business unit is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the business unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the business unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_units_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entry */,
  "ledger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ledger account associated */,
  "concatenated_id" TEXT /* Concatenated ID for easy reference */,
  "cost_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost center responsible for the entry */,
  "company_id" TEXT /* ID of the company associated with the entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the entry was recorded */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business unit responsible for the entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial entry */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the financial entry */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the entry */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency of the financial entry */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used for the entry */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the financial entry has been approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_entries_ledger_id FOREIGN KEY ("ledger_id") REFERENCES ledger_accounts ("ledger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_entries_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_entries_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_entries_business_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_entries_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_entries_cost_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_center_id") REFERENCES cost_centers ("cost_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_entries_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accountant, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "cost_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost center associated with the budget */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the budget allocation */,
  "allocated_amount" REAL /* Total allocated budget amount */,
  "spent_amount" REAL /* Amount spent from the allocated budget */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the budget is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_cost_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_center_id") REFERENCES cost_centers ("cost_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial entry being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action took place */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the audit log is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES financial_entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial entry associated with the attachment */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the attachment */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the attachment was uploaded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attachment is active */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attachment file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES financial_entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial entry the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES financial_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code for the currency (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate to the base currency */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the currency is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the currency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the currency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial year */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the financial year is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial year was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial year was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment method is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
